creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon Mar 18 14:41:37 2013
New Revision: 314568
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314568

Log:
  - Update to 1.13
  
  Changes:	https://github.com/wummel/dosage/blob/master/doc/changelog.txt
  PR:		ports/177053
  Submitted by:	antoine@ (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile
  head/deskutils/dosage/distinfo
  head/deskutils/dosage/pkg-plist

Modified: head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile	Mon Mar 18 14:40:49 2013	(r314567)
+++ head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile	Mon Mar 18 14:41:37 2013	(r314568)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dosage
-PORTVERSION=	1.12
+PORTVERSION=	1.13
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils python
 
 MAINTAINER=	antoine@FreeBSD.org
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requ
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	wummel
 GH_TAGNAME=	upstream/${PORTVERSION}
-GH_COMMIT=	9d6f4ee
+GH_COMMIT=	950a958
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
